# Vendored Map Assets

The GitHub Pages map vendors small browser-side dependencies so the page can
render without a build step or runtime CDN dependency.

- `d3.min.js`: D3, BSD-3-Clause
- `topojson-client.min.js`: TopoJSON client, ISC
- `../data/states-10m.json`: U.S. state geometry from `us-atlas`, ISC
